known_gaps: Promotion parse_request currently records COMPONENT_INVALID_ACCEPTANCE because component_policy.acceptance does not support fabrication-candidate.
The op-amp headphone buffer seed still uses placeholder connector protection; the protected Class AB headphone path exists separately at connectivity level through headphone_output_protection.
Fabrication-candidate component evidence is intentionally unavailable for the amplifier seed, so optional KiCad-backed runs must fail closed before claiming ERC/DRC-ready analog output.
Amplifier-specific layout proof for feedback proximity, supply decoupling, high-current output width, thermal placement, active fault protection, and headphone load safety remains future work.
notes: Optional amplifier fixture that documents the expected fabrication-candidate blockers for real kicad-cli validation promotion.
